value: Nursing and Midwifery Board of Australia
Abu Dhabi residency: OET >= C for international graduates.
Dubai residency: OET = 300 (C+ in all categories).
UK NMC registration: reading/listening/speaking >= B and writing >= C+.
Australia NMBA registration: minimum B in each of the four components.
GCC-wide scope is not publicly verified; the safe route is UAE plus selected UK/Australia regulator acceptance.
Official OET acceptance does not prove that this specific course or its own certificate is sufficient for DHA or DoH pathways.
The 94-lead pilot number is internal only.
Repricing as a market-fit fix is a commercial hypothesis, not a verified fact.
No public source supports pass-guarantee language.

target_audience_summary.value: Healthcare professionals using OET for route-relevant English proof, especially in verified UAE pathways and selected international recognition tracks.
target_audience_summary.omission_reason: Useful synthesis, but not a default dashboard fact.

market_evidence_summary.omission_reason: Derived SEMrush market-evidence layer for prioritization and further research. Keep it out of customer-facing copy until translated into route-safe product language.
